An upcoming influenza virus A(H 5 N 1) pandemic poses incredible challenges to the vaccine manufacturers community. Of note, only Arepanrix, Aflunov, and Zoonotic Influenza Vaccine are updated on the currently circulating 2.3.4.4b clade, even considering that the two latter are based upon H 5 N 8 and not H 5 N 1 virus.
